title: 菊花賞の後に・人生のステイヤー

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Claiming victory at the Kikuka Sho, Mejiro
McQueen's dominance at long-distance races is
indisputable.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan expresses her frustration at their
difference in ability.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In response, McQueen tells Ryan that she hopes
to see her best effort in the final furlong of their
next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Kikuka Sho over, our next race is the
Arima Kinen. Mejiro Ryan must now prepare for a
race where many new, strong opponents await.
